item.ptxt: For type distinction of OBD model, refer to “Discrimination for OBD System” under OBD System Description .
For Euro-OBD model, in case that MIL turns on, the malfunction(s) is detected in either ECM or TCM (A/T model) and it stores the trouble information (DTC, freeze flame data, etc.) in its memory.
Check the trouble information according to the type of scan tool as follows.
Check ECM and TCM (A/T model) separately because the trouble information of both modules cannot be read and displayed simultaneously.
CAN communication OBD generic scan tool:
Check both ECM and TCM (A/T model) simultaneously.

s1.ptxt: Prepare SUZUKI scan tool or CAN communication OBD generic scan tool.
With ignition “OFF”, connect scan tool to DLC (1).
Set ignition “ON” and confirm that MIL lights up.
Read DTC, pending DTC and freeze frame data according to instructions displayed on scan tool and print them or write them down. Refer to scan tool operator's manual for further details.
If communication between scan tool and ECM is impossible, go to Troubleshooting for Communication Bus Off .
After completing the check, set ignition “OFF” and disconnect scan tool from DLC.
